extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates Against and By rows: I counted only the Against rows, obtaining criminal proceedings of 0 for the Company, 0 for subsidiaries, 3 for Directors, 1 for the Promoter and 3 for Key Managerial Personnel; statutory/regulatory proceedings of 0, 0, 1, 1 and 1 respectively; and tax proceedings against the Company and subsidiaries of 21 and 2 respectively. For the aggregate litigation amount, I used only the Company and Subsidiary Against rows: ₹287.35 million plus ₹0.62 million, excluding promoter/director/KMP matters and all By rows, totalling ₹287.97 million. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹217.40 million as of March 31, 2025, not a re-sum of line items. The company-wide top-five and top-ten customer concentrations are for Fiscal 2025 and are measured as percentages of total revenue from operations: 43.64% and 58.40%, respectively. Monetary tables use ₹ million; conversion to crore is by dividing by 10, so ₹287.97 million equals ₹28.797 crore and ₹217.40 million equals ₹21.74 crore.
